Assessment

Hanraths reads as a combative, physically-led centre-back whose game is built around intensity rather than craft. His Presser designation is driven by an aggressive defensive approach — Aggression 15 and Leadership 15 mark him out as the kind of player who sets the defensive tone from the front, and his Pace and Acceleration both at 13 give him the ground speed to hunt in behind the line when the press is triggered. Stamina 13 means he can sustain that effort across ninety minutes without fading.

The Anchor and Target secondaries both register because the same physical toolkit that makes him a presser also makes him a reliable defensive unit in settled shape. Marking 13, Tackling 13, and Positioning 13 are a clean trio for a holding defender, and Jumping Reach 14 with Heading 13 make him a genuine aerial threat at set-pieces and a dominant presence in defensive boxes. What he is not is a ball-playing centre-back — Vision 7, Technique 9, and Composure 9 all point away from any build-up or distribution role, and Dribbling 8 rules him out of carrying the ball forward under pressure. He is best deployed in a side that wants its defensive line to be aggressive, physically dominant, and led by example.
